projectDescription: An experimental modular 32-bit operating system for the i386 architecture, written in C and Assembly, featuring a Multiboot-compliant kernel, VFS, interactive shell, service manager, and a built-in package manager.
keyFeatures: Virtual File System (VFS) with custom CRFS rootfs format
Interactive text shell with Linux-like commands
GDT and IDT initialization for protected mode
PS/2 keyboard and mouse drivers with interrupt support
Init-style service manager (systemd-like) reading unit files
LCP package manager (in-kernel and host-side Python tool)
Assembly-backed arithmetic operations (add, sub, mul, div)
Build toolchain with GRUB bootloader and QEMU emulation support
Multi-layout PS/2 keyboard support (US, ES, DE)
publicApiSurface: vfs_init() / vfs_cd() / vfs_list() / vfs_cat() / vfs_mkdir() / vfs_touch() / vfs_remove() / vfs_rmdir() / vfs_cp() / vfs_mv() / vfs_write() / vfs_read() / vfs_get_size() / vfs_exists() / vfs_pwd()
fs_init(const void *image, size_t size) / fs_find() / fs_file_at() / fs_file_count()
add_asm() / sub_asm() / mul_asm() / div_asm() / halt_cpu() / reboot_cpu() / inb() / outb() / console_putxy() / memsetw_asm()
kstrlen() / kstrcmp() / kstrncmp() / kstrcpy() / kstrcat() / kstrstr() / kstrchr() / kmemset() / kmemcpy() / kmemcmp() / kitoa() / kskip_spaces() / kstreq()
lcp CLI tool: search / info / install / remove / update / upgrade / list / clean / files / depends / verify / repo
